# zstack_iam2_virtual_id (Resource)

Manages an IAM2 Virtual ID in ZStack.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the IAM2 virtual ID
- `password` (String, Sensitive) The password for the IAM2 virtual ID

### Optional

- `description` (String) The description of the IAM2 virtual ID

### Read-Only

- `state` (String) The state of the IAM2 virtual ID
- `type` (String) The type of the IAM2 virtual ID
- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the IAM2 virtual ID
